title: Play Piano by Ear
audience: Aspiring pianists frustrated with traditional lessons
goal: Encourage viewers to download the free cheat sheet
hook: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.

scenes.headline: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.
scenes.voiceover: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.

assets.description: A musician or student looking frustrated or confused while reading sheet music at a piano, capturing the emotion of frustration

scenes.headline: Feeling stuck with sheet music?
scenes.body: Many aspiring musicians feel stuck, thinking they need to read sheet music to play their favorite songs.
scenes.voiceover: Many aspiring musicians feel stuck, thinking they need to read sheet music to play their favorite songs.

scenes.headline: The truth is liberating
scenes.body: You can play by ear with just four chords.
scenes.voiceover: But here's the truth: you can play by ear with just four chords.

scenes.headline: Imagine the possibilities
scenes.body: Imagine playing at church or a jam session, effortlessly creating music.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine playing at church or a jam session, effortlessly creating music.

assets.description: A Black musician or pianist playing confidently at a piano in a church or music studio, smiling, showing the positive outcome

scenes.headline: Get started today
scenes.voiceover: Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and transform your piano skills today.

voiceover_script: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't. Many aspiring musicians feel stuck, thinking they need to read sheet music to play their favorite songs. But here's the truth: you can play by ear with just four chords. Imagine playing at church or a jam session, effortlessly creating music. Our free cheat sheet reveals these four chords so you can start playing the songs you love. Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and transform your piano skills today.
thumbnail_concept: A confident pianist smiling at a piano in a church setting
caption: Unlock the secret to playing piano by ear. Free cheat sheet!
caption_hook: Play by ear, not by sheet
